title: Export menu component with copy, export turn, and export session options
purpose: Provides a dropdown menu for exporting chat session data with options to copy the current turn, export the current turn, or export the entire session.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named ExportMenu that accepts props for handling different export actions and manages its own open/closed state.

steps.content: Initialize the open state to false.
Create a ref to track the menu's DOM element.
Set up a document event listener to close the menu when clicking outside.
Define a handler for menu items that executes the provided callback and closes the menu.
Render the menu button and conditional dropdown with three export options.
Check if the click target is outside the menu element.
IF the click is outside, close the menu.
IF a handler is provided, execute it.
Close the menu after executing the handler.
